bullets.text: Redesigned the transaction ingestion pipeline using Kafka and Python asyncio, reducing end-to-end latency by 40% at 10,000 events/second.
Maintained 99.9% API uptime across 12 microservices by introducing structured error budgets and automated rollback on SLO breach.
Led migration of the core account-ledger service from a monolithic Django app to FastAPI microservices, cutting p99 response time from 800ms to 120ms.
Shipped a self-serve internal tooling API used by 30+ analysts to query transaction data without filing engineering tickets.
Designed and owned PostgreSQL schema migrations for the payments ledger, managing 80+ migrations across 4 environments with zero downtime.
Built a streaming data ingestion service in Go and gRPC that processed 50 GB/day of customer event data with under 200ms tail latency.
Replaced a polling-based ETL job with a Redis Streams consumer, cutting infrastructure costs by 35% and eliminating a class of duplicate-event bugs.
Wrote integration and contract tests that reduced the production incident rate by half over six months.
Developed REST APIs with Django and PostgreSQL for 5 client projects, each delivered on schedule.
Introduced automated linting and pre-commit hooks, reducing code review cycle time by roughly 20%.
